251.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) through his son al-Tufayl that he said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: The first blast has come followed by the second. Death has come with all that it entails.'
251.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) melalui anaknya al-Thufail bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: Sangkakala pertama telah datang disusul yang kedua. Kematian telah datang dengan segala yang dibawanya.'

252.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that a man said: 'O Messenger of Allah, what if I dedicate all of my prayers to you?' He said: 'Then Allah, Blessed and Exalted, will suffice you in what concerns you of this world and the next.'
252.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa seorang pria berkata: 'Ya Rasulullah, bagaimana jika aku mendedikasikan seluruh doaku untukmu?' Beliau bersabda: 'Maka Allah Tabaaraka wa Ta'ala akan mencukupimu dalam apa yang menjadi urusanmu di dunia dan akhirat.'

253.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) through his son al-Tufayl that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'My example among the prophets is like a man who built a house, made it beautiful and complete, but left the place of one brick unfilled. People would circle the building admiring it and say: If only this brick were placed. I am that brick, and I am the Seal of the Prophets.'
253.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) melalui anaknya al-Thufail bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Perumpamaanku di antara para nabi seperti seorang pria yang membangun sebuah rumah, membuatnya indah dan sempurna, tetapi meninggalkan tempat satu bata yang tidak diisi. Orang-orang mengelilingi bangunan itu mengaguminya dan berkata: Seandainya bata ini diletakkan. Akulah bata itu, dan aku adalah Penutup Para Nabi.'

254.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) through his son al-Tufayl that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'My example among the prophets is like a man who built a house, made it excellent, beautiful, and complete, but left the place of one brick. People would circle the building, admiring it, saying: If only this brick were placed!'
254.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) melalui anaknya al-Thufail bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Perumpamaanku di antara para nabi seperti seorang pria yang membangun sebuah rumah, membuatnya sempurna, indah, dan lengkap, tetapi meninggalkan tempat satu bata. Orang-orang mengelilingi bangunan itu, mengaguminya, berkata: Seandainya bata ini diletakkan!'

255.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) through his son al-Tufayl that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'When the Day of Resurrection comes, I will be the imam of the prophets, their spokesman, and the owner of their intercession — without pride.'
255.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) melalui anaknya al-Thufail bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Ketika Hari Kiamat tiba, aku akan menjadi imam para nabi, juru bicara mereka, dan pemilik syafaat mereka — tanpa kesombongan.'

256.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) through his son al-Tufayl that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'When the Day of Resurrection comes, I will be the imam of the prophets.' And the rest of the hadith was mentioned.
256.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) melalui anaknya al-Thufail bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Ketika Hari Kiamat tiba, aku akan menjadi imam para nabi.' Dan sisa hadits disebutkan.

257.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to deliver khutbah leaning against a palm trunk. A man from his companions said: 'O Messenger of Allah, shall we make something for you to stand on for the Friday sermon so the people can see you and hear your khutbah?' He said: 'Yes.' So three steps were made — those that are on the minbar. When the minbar was set up, the trunk cried out like a camel.',
257.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa berkhutbah sambil bersandar pada batang pohon kurma. Seorang pria dari sahabatnya berkata: 'Ya Rasulullah, maukah kami membuatkan sesuatu untukmu untuk berdiri pada hari Jum'at sehingga orang-orang dapat melihatmu dan mendengar khutbahmu?' Beliau bersabda: 'Ya.' Maka tiga anak tangga dibuat — yang ada di mimbar. Ketika mimbar disiapkan, batang itu menangis seperti unta.'

258.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) through his son al-Tufayl that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'When the Day of Resurrection comes, I will be the imam of the people, their spokesman, and the owner of their intercession — without pride.'
258.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) melalui anaknya al-Thufail bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Ketika Hari Kiamat tiba, aku akan menjadi imam manusia, juru bicara mereka, dan pemilik syafaat mereka — tanpa kesombongan.'

259.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that during the Isra, he saw a tree and if he took from it, it would fill what is between the sky and the earth and would not diminish. Then Paradise was shown to him, and when he felt the heat of its blaze, he stepped back.
259.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa selama Isra, beliau melihat sebuah pohon dan jika beliau mengambil darinya, itu akan memenuhi apa yang ada antara langit dan bumi dan tidak akan berkurang. Kemudian Neraka diperlihatkan kepadanya, dan ketika beliau merasakan panas sinarnya, beliau mundur.

260.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ had a canopy of branches and used to deliver the khutbah to the people next to a palm trunk. A man said: 'O Messenger of Allah, shall I make you a minbar to stand on for the Friday sermon so the people can see your khutbah?' He said: 'Yes.' So three steps were made.
260.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ memiliki kanopi dari dahan dan biasa berkhutbah kepada orang-orang di samping batang pohon kurma. Seorang pria berkata: 'Ya Rasulullah, bolehkah aku membuatkan mimbar untukmu untuk berdiri pada hari Jum'at sehingga orang-orang dapat melihat khutbahmu?' Beliau bersabda: 'Ya.' Maka tiga anak tangga dibuat.

261.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) through his son al-Tufayl that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'When the Day of Resurrection comes, I will be the imam of the prophets, their spokesman, and the owner of their intercession — without pride.'
261.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) melalui anaknya al-Thufail bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Ketika Hari Kiamat tiba, aku akan menjadi imam para nabi, juru bicara mereka, dan pemilik syafaat mereka — tanpa kesombongan.'

262.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Were it not for the emigration, I would have been a man from the Ansar. And if the Ansar were to go through a valley or ravine, I would be with the Ansar.'
262.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Seandainya bukan karena hijrah, aku akan menjadi orang dari kaum Anshar. Dan jika kaum Anshar pergi melalui suatu lembah atau celah, aku akan bersama kaum Anshar.'

263.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) through his son al-Tufayl that he heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say about the verse: 'And He made them adhere to the word of piety': 'This is: There is no deity except Allah.'
263.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) melalui anaknya al-Thufail bahwa ia mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda tentang ayat: 'Dan Dia menjadikan mereka berpegang pada kalimat ketakwaan': 'Ini adalah: Tidak ada tuhan selain Allah.'

264.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) through his son al-Tufayl that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'When the Day of Resurrection comes, I will be the imam of the prophets, their spokesman, and the owner of their intercession — without pride.'
264.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) melalui anaknya al-Thufail bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Ketika Hari Kiamat tiba, aku akan menjadi imam para nabi, juru bicara mereka, dan pemilik syafaat mereka — tanpa kesombongan.'

265.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) through his son al-Tufayl that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'Were it not for the emigration, I would have been a man from the Ansar. And if the Ansar were to go through a valley or ravine, I would be with the Ansar.'
265.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) melalui anaknya al-Thufail bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Seandainya bukan karena hijrah, aku akan menjadi orang dari kaum Anshar. Dan jika kaum Anshar pergi melalui suatu lembah atau celah, aku akan bersama kaum Anshar.'

266.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) through his son al-Tufayl that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Were it not for the emigration, I would have been a man from the Ansar. And if the people were to go through a ravine or valley, I would be with the Ansar.'
266.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) melalui anaknya al-Thufail bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Seandainya bukan karena hijrah, aku akan menjadi orang dari kaum Anshar. Dan jika orang-orang pergi melalui celah atau lembah, aku akan bersama kaum Anshar.'

267.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) through his son al-Tufayl that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'When the Day of Resurrection comes, I will be the imam of the prophets, their spokesman, and the owner of their intercession — without pride.'
267.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) melalui anaknya al-Thufail bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Ketika Hari Kiamat tiba, aku akan menjadi imam para nabi, juru bicara mereka, dan pemilik syafaat mereka — tanpa kesombongan.'

268.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that a man suggested making a minbar for the Prophet ﷺ so people could see and hear him during his khutbah. He agreed. Three steps were made. The Prophet ﷺ stood as he was accustomed. The palm trunk leaned toward him. He said to it: 'Be still.' Then he said to his companions: 'This trunk is weeping for what it has missed of the remembrance of Allah.'
268.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa seorang pria menyarankan dibuatkan mimbar untuk Nabi ﷺ agar orang-orang dapat melihat dan mendengarnya saat khutbah. Beliau setuju. Tiga anak tangga dibuat. Nabi ﷺ berdiri seperti biasanya. Batang pohon kurma condong ke arahnya. Beliau berkata kepadanya: 'Diamlah.' Kemudian beliau berkata kepada para sahabatnya: 'Batang ini menangis karena apa yang telah terlewatkan dari zikir kepada Allah.'

269.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) regarding the Night Journey that he said: 'Two men came toward me and took each of my arms. I did not feel their touch. One said to the other: Lay him down. They laid me down without any constraint. One said: Open his chest.'
269.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) tentang Perjalanan Malam bahwa ia berkata: 'Dua orang mendekat ke arahku dan memegang kedua lenganku. Aku tidak merasakan sentuhan mereka. Salah satu berkata kepada yang lain: Baringkan ia. Mereka membaringkanku tanpa paksaan. Salah satu berkata: Buka dadanya.'

270.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say: The Euphrates will soon recede to reveal a mountain of gold. When the people hear of it they will rush to it, and those already there will say: If we leave, the others will take it. They will fight each other until ninety-nine out of every hundred are killed.'
270.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: Sungai Furat akan segera surut mengungkap sebuah gunung emas. Ketika orang-orang mendengarnya mereka akan bergegas ke sana, dan mereka yang sudah di sana akan berkata: Jika kami pergi, yang lain akan mengambilnya. Mereka akan bertarung satu sama lain hingga sembilan puluh sembilan dari setiap seratus terbunuh.'

271.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that the people will fight each other over the gold of the Euphrates until ninety-nine out of every hundred perish.
271.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa orang-orang akan berperang satu sama lain atas emas Furat hingga sembilan puluh sembilan dari setiap seratus binasa.

272.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that during his prayer he noticed a young man in front of him and did not know what to make of his prayer. After praying he said: 'O my son, may Allah not grieve you. I did not come to you out of ignorance. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ told us to stand in the row closest to him.'
272.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa saat shalatnya ia memperhatikan seorang pemuda di depannya dan tidak tahu apa yang harus dipikirkan tentang shalatnya. Setelah shalat ia berkata: 'Wahai anakku, semoga Allah tidak menyedihkanmu. Aku tidak datang kepadamu karena kebodohan. Rasulullah ﷺ memberitahu kami untuk berdiri di shaf yang paling dekat dengannya.'

273.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that after Fajr prayer the Prophet ﷺ asked: 'Is so-and-so present?' They said: 'No.' He asked again. They said: 'No.' He said: 'These two prayers — Fajr and Isha — are the heaviest for the hypocrites. If they knew what is in them, they would come to them even crawling. The front row is like the row of angels.'
273.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa setelah shalat Subuh Nabi ﷺ bertanya: 'Apakah si fulan hadir?' Mereka berkata: 'Tidak.' Beliau bertanya lagi. Mereka berkata: 'Tidak.' Beliau bersabda: 'Kedua shalat ini — Subuh dan Isya — paling berat bagi orang munafik. Jika mereka tahu apa yang ada di dalamnya, mereka akan mendatanginya meski dengan merangkak. Shaf pertama seperti shaf para malaikat.'

274.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that a man came to him in Madinah and said: 'Tell me the most amazing hadith you heard from the Messenger of Allah ﷺ.' So he narrated it.
274.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa seorang pria datang kepadanya di Madinah dan berkata: 'Ceritakan kepadaku hadits paling mengagumkan yang kamu dengar dari Rasulullah ﷺ.' Lalu ia menceritakannya.

275.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ led Fajr prayer and when he finished, he looked at the few people in the mosque. He asked: 'Is so-and-so present?' until he named three people. He said: 'These two prayers — Fajr and Isha — are the heaviest on the hypocrites.'
275.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ mengimami shalat Subuh dan ketika selesai, beliau melihat sedikitnya orang di masjid. Beliau bertanya: 'Apakah si fulan hadir?' hingga beliau menyebut tiga orang. Beliau bersabda: 'Kedua shalat ini — Subuh dan Isya — paling berat bagi orang munafik.'

276.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ led them in the Fajr prayer. When he finished, he turned to them and said: 'Verily the heaviest prayers on the hypocrites are these two prayers — Fajr and Isha.'
276.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ mengimami mereka dalam shalat Subuh. Ketika selesai, beliau menghadap mereka dan bersabda: 'Sesungguhnya shalat yang paling berat bagi orang munafik adalah dua shalat ini — Subuh dan Isya.'

277.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) — or from a man of the Ansar — that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Whoever recites Say: He is Allah, the One, it is as if he has recited a third of the Quran.'
277.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) — atau dari seorang pria dari kaum Anshar — bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Siapa yang membaca Qul huwallahu ahad, seolah ia telah membaca sepertiga Al-Quran.'

278.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'Praying in one garment is a sunnah — we used to do it with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and were not criticized for it.' Ibn Masud said: 'That was when there was a shortage of garments. Now that Allah has given ease...'
278.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Shalat dalam satu pakaian adalah sunnah — kami biasa melakukannya bersama Rasulullah ﷺ dan tidak dikritik karenanya.' Ibn Masud berkata: 'Itu ketika ada kekurangan pakaian. Sekarang Allah telah memberikan kelapangan...'

279.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ — and the hadith was mentioned.
279.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ — dan hadits disebutkan.

280.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ asked him: 'Which verse in the Book of Allah is greatest?' He said: 'Allah and His Messenger know best.' He repeated it several times. Then Ubayy said: 'Ayat al-Kursi.' He said: 'Rejoice in your knowledge, O Abu al-Mundhir. By the One in whose hand is my soul, it has a tongue and two lips that glorify the Sovereign near the foot of the Throne.'
280.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bertanya kepadanya: 'Ayat mana dalam Kitab Allah yang paling agung?' Ia berkata: 'Allah dan Rasul-Nya lebih tahu.' Beliau mengulanginya beberapa kali. Kemudian Ubayy berkata: 'Ayat al-Kursi.' Beliau bersabda: 'Bergembiralah dengan ilmumu, wahai Abu al-Mundzir. Demi Zat yang jiwaku ada di tangan-Nya, ia memiliki lidah dan dua bibir yang bertasbih kepada Raja di dekat kaki Arsy.'

281.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that a zakat collector came to him and he disagreed with the amount assessed. He said: 'By Allah, the Messenger of Allah ﷺ never came to my wealth, nor did any messenger of his before this.' The collector assessed a young female camel, which has no milk and is not fit for riding.
281.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa seorang pengumpul zakat datang kepadanya dan ia tidak setuju dengan jumlah yang dinilai. Ia berkata: 'Demi Allah, Rasulullah ﷺ tidak pernah datang ke hartaku, dan tidak pula utusannya sebelum ini.' Pengumpul itu menilai seekor unta betina muda yang tidak memiliki susu dan tidak layak untuk ditunggang.

282.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ led the people in prayer and missed a verse. He asked: 'Which of you caught something from my recitation?' Ubayy said: 'I did, O Messenger of Allah — you missed such-and-such a verse.' The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'I knew it had been overlooked.'
282.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ mengimami orang-orang dalam shalat dan melewatkan sebuah ayat. Beliau bertanya: 'Siapa di antara kalian yang menangkap sesuatu dari bacaanku?' Ubayy berkata: 'Aku, ya Rasulullah — engkau melewatkan ayat ini dan itu.' Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Aku tahu itu terlewatkan.'

283.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said to him: 'When did you last have fever?' He said: 'I have never had it.' The Prophet ﷺ said: 'The likeness of the believer is like a green shoot — it goes red sometimes and yellow other times.'
283.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ berkata kepadanya: 'Kapan terakhir kamu mengalami demam?' Ia berkata: 'Aku belum pernah mengalaminya.' Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Perumpamaan orang beriman seperti tanaman hijau — kadang memerah dan kadang menguning.'

284.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ wore striped Himyarite garments and the Companions wore them in his time. Umar wanted to forbid striped garments dyed with urine, but Ubayy said: 'That is not your right — the Prophet ﷺ wore them and we wore them in his time.'
284.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ mengenakan pakaian bergaris Himyar dan para Sahabat mengenakannya di masanya. Umar ingin melarang pakaian bergaris yang dicelup dengan urin, tetapi Ubayy berkata: 'Itu bukan hakmu — Nabi ﷺ mengenakannya dan kami mengenakannya di masanya.'

285.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I found one hundred gold dinars in the time of the Prophet ﷺ and asked the Prophet ﷺ about it. He said: Announce it for a year.' He repeated it to him until he mentioned three years. He said: 'O Messenger of Allah, then what?' He said: 'It is yours to use.'
285.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku menemukan seratus dinar emas pada masa Nabi ﷺ dan bertanya kepada Nabi ﷺ tentangnya. Beliau bersabda: Umumkan selama satu tahun.' Ia mengulanginya kepadanya hingga menyebut tiga tahun. Ia berkata: 'Ya Rasulullah, lalu apa?' Beliau bersabda: 'Itu milikmu untuk digunakan.'

286.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'O Abu al-Mundhir' — and then mentioned a hadith.
286.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Wahai Abu al-Mundzir' — kemudian menyebutkan sebuah hadits.

287.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that a man asked during the prayer about a surah that was recited, and Ubayy signaled him to be quiet. When the prayer was over, Ubayy said: 'You have nothing of your prayer today except what you wasted.' The man went to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and mentioned this, and the Prophet ﷺ confirmed what Ubayy said.
287.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa seorang pria bertanya saat shalat tentang surah yang sedang dibaca, dan Ubayy mengisyaratkan untuk diam. Ketika shalat selesai, Ubayy berkata: 'Kamu tidak mendapatkan apapun dari shalatmu hari ini kecuali apa yang kamu sia-siakan.' Pria itu pergi kepada Rasulullah ﷺ dan menyebutkan hal ini, dan Nabi ﷺ membenarkan apa yang dikatakan Ubayy.

288.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) regarding the Night Journey that he found in the heavens Adam, Idris, Musa, Isa, and Ibrahim (peace be upon them all). He said he could not confirm exactly where each was except that Adam was in the lowest heaven and Ibrahim in the sixth.
288.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) tentang Perjalanan Malam bahwa beliau menemukan di langit-langit Adam, Idris, Musa, Isa, dan Ibrahim (alaihi salam). Ia berkata ia tidak dapat memastikan dengan tepat di mana masing-masing berada kecuali bahwa Adam ada di langit terendah dan Ibrahim di langit keenam.

289.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) and Anas ibn Malik that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Allah, Blessed and Exalted, made fifty prayers obligatory upon my nation.' He said: 'I returned with that until I passed by Musa (peace be upon him), who asked: What has your Lord made obligatory upon your nation?' And the dialogue continued until the prayers were reduced.
289.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) dan Anas ibn Malik bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Allah Tabaaraka wa Ta'ala mewajibkan lima puluh shalat atas umatku.' Beliau bersabda: 'Aku kembali dengan itu sampai aku melewati Musa (alaihi salam), yang bertanya: Apa yang telah Rabb-mu wajibkan atas umatmu?' Dan dialog berlanjut hingga shalat dikurangi.

290.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I wish I knew when a fire will emerge from Yemen from the mountain of al-Waraq, lighting up the necks of camels as they sit in Busra, as bright as daylight.'
290.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku berharap aku tahu kapan api akan keluar dari Yaman dari gunung al-Waraq, menerangi leher-leher unta yang sedang duduk di Busra, seterang siang hari.'

291.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr al-Ghifari (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said he would go back to the mosque of the Prophet ﷺ and to his house. The Prophet ﷺ asked him: 'What will you do when you are expelled?' He said: 'Then I will take my sword and strike whoever expels me.' The Prophet ﷺ placed his hand on his shoulder and said: 'Forgiveness, O Abu Dharr' — three times — 'rather you must comply with them.'
291.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dzarr al-Ghifari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata akan kembali ke masjid Nabi ﷺ dan ke rumahnya. Nabi ﷺ bertanya kepadanya: 'Apa yang akan kamu lakukan ketika kamu diusir?' Ia berkata: 'Maka aku akan mengambil pedangku dan menyerang siapa pun yang mengusirku.' Nabi ﷺ meletakkan tangannya di bahunya dan bersabda: 'Ampunan, wahai Abu Dzarr' — tiga kali — 'melainkan kamu harus patuh kepada mereka.'

292.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr al-Ghifari (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'Islam is gentle — it is only ridden by the gentle.'
292.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dzarr al-Ghifari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Islam itu lemah lembut — hanya dinaiki oleh yang lemah lembut.'

293.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr al-Ghifari (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'Two are better than one, three are better than two, and four are better than three — so stay with the congregation, for Allah, the Mighty and Majestic, will not unite my nation except upon guidance.'
293.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dzarr al-Ghifari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Dua lebih baik dari satu, tiga lebih baik dari dua, dan empat lebih baik dari tiga — maka tetaplah bersama jamaah, karena Allah Yang Maha Perkasa lagi Maha Agung tidak akan menyatukan umatku kecuali dalam petunjuk.'

294.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr al-Ghifari (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say: When one of you loves his companion, let him go to his house and tell him that he loves him for the sake of Allah.'
294.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dzarr al-Ghifari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: Ketika salah seorang dari kalian mencintai sahabatnya, hendaklah ia pergi ke rumahnya dan memberitahunya bahwa ia mencintainya karena Allah.'

295.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr al-Ghifari (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I heard Umar ibn al-Khattab say: What a fine young man is Ghudhayf! And indeed the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: Allah, the Mighty and Majestic, has placed the truth on the tongue of Umar and his heart.'
295.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dzarr al-Ghifari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku mendengar Umar ibn al-Khattab berkata: Pemuda yang baik adalah Ghudhayf! Dan sesungguhnya Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: Allah Yang Maha Perkasa lagi Maha Agung telah meletakkan kebenaran pada lidah Umar dan hatinya.'

296.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr al-Ghifari (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said — three times — 'Something other than the Dajjal frightens me most for my nation.' He asked: 'O Messenger of Allah, what is this thing other than the Dajjal that frightens you most for your nation?' He said: 'Misguiding leaders.'
296.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dzarr al-Ghifari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda — tiga kali — 'Sesuatu selain Dajjal yang paling aku takutkan untuk umatku.' Ia bertanya: 'Ya Rasulullah, apa hal selain Dajjal yang paling kamu takutkan untuk umatmu?' Beliau bersabda: 'Pemimpin yang menyesatkan.'

297.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr al-Ghifari (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'Something other than the Dajjal is more feared for my nation than the Dajjal.' When he feared it would enter his heart, he asked: 'O Messenger of Allah, what is more feared for your nation than the Dajjal?' He said: 'Misguiding leaders.'
297.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dzarr al-Ghifari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Sesuatu selain Dajjal lebih dikhawatirkan untuk umatku daripada Dajjal.' Ketika ia khawatir hal itu masuk ke hatinya, ia bertanya: 'Ya Rasulullah, apa yang lebih dikhawatirkan untuk umatmu daripada Dajjal?' Beliau bersabda: 'Pemimpin yang menyesatkan.'

298.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr al-Ghifari (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said to me: O Abu Dharr, shall I not point you to a treasure from the treasures of Paradise? Say: There is no power and no strength except with Allah.'
298.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dzarr al-Ghifari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda kepadaku: Wahai Abu Dzarr, tidakkah aku tunjukkan kepadamu sebuah harta dari harta-harta Surga? Ucapkanlah: Laa haula wa laa quwwata illaa billaah.'

299.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr al-Ghifari (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'The earth was made pure and a mosque for me, the spoils of war were made lawful for me while they were not lawful for anyone before me, I was sent to the red and the black, and I was told: Ask and you will be given. So I have saved it as intercession for my nation.'
299.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dzarr al-Ghifari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Bumi dijadikan suci dan masjid bagiku, ghanimah dihalalkan bagiku sementara tidak dihalalkan bagi siapapun sebelumku, aku diutus kepada yang merah dan yang hitam, dan dikatakan kepadaku: Mintalah dan akan diberikan. Maka aku menyimpannya sebagai syafaat bagi umatku.'

300.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr al-Ghifari (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'The sun sets beneath the Throne and is given permission, then it returns. When that night comes whose morning the sun rises from the West, it will not be given permission. When morning comes, it will be told: Rise from where you are.' Then he recited: 'Are they waiting for anything except...'
300.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dzarr al-Ghifari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Matahari terbenam di bawah Arsy dan diberi izin, kemudian kembali. Ketika malam itu tiba yang paginya matahari terbit dari Barat, tidak akan diberi izin. Ketika pagi tiba, akan dikatakan kepadanya: Terbitlah dari tempatmu.' Kemudian beliau membaca: 'Apakah mereka menunggu sesuatu kecuali...'
